question: Can the pre-registered simpler BTC-only positive 90-day spot rule remain profitable across 60/180-day neighborhoods and sequential rule-level holdouts with controlled drawdown?
development_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-30% and below BTC 0.5x; 60d/180d base >0; turnover <=20
evaluation_gate: 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-25% and below BTC 0.5x; 60d/180d base >0
confirmation_gate: 90d base/stress >=0; max drawdown >-20% and below BTC 0.5x; 60d/180d base >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
holdout_release_rule: reuse exposed development after checkpoint; fetch evaluation only after pass; confirmation only after evaluation pass
